_comment: Plan 05.1-07. Flagship Power Apps read-first admin ops. 10 aliases selected from the 19-op __pwrapps__ catalog produced by plan 05.1-03.

rationale.__pwrapps__list-apps: Tenant-scoped app inventory; entry point to every Power Apps admin workflow.
rationale.__pwrapps__get-app: Single-app manifest read; required before any edit/publish/share follow-up.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-app-environments: Cross-environment app distribution view; grounding call for migration / governance flows.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-environments: Tenant-wide environment enumeration; prerequisite for all environment-scoped ops.
rationale.__pwrapps__get-environment: Single-environment read; paired with list-environments for drill-down governance.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-connections: Per-environment connection inventory; surfaces tenant's integration footprint.
rationale.__pwrapps__get-connection: Single-connection read for audit of credentials/scopes per connector.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-connectors: Per-environment connector catalog (custom + standard); compliance surface for connector governance.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-licenses: Per-environment license enumeration; prerequisite for capacity / cost-governance flows.
rationale.__pwrapps__list-users: Per-environment user enumeration; identity surface for RBAC and audit flows.
